{{Fig|'''SuperMemo Commander''' (available with '''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]] : [[SuperMemo Commander|Commander]]'''; alternatively, and more quickly, with ''Ctrl+Enter'') allows of fast execution of commands via mnemonic keyboard shortcuts.<br /><br />A [[Glossary#cloze_deletion|cloze deletion]] may seem to violate the [http://www.supermemo.com/articles/20rules.htm 20 rules]. This cloze will be improved over many repetitions in accordance with the principle: "'''one memory, one action'''"}}
